Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionAuxiliaryContract

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExecutionAuxiliaryContract, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessBlockContract
public interface IExecutionAuxiliaryContract extends IExecutionNode<SourceElement>

A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a use block/loop contract application.

The default implementation is ExecutionAuxiliaryContract which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

See Also:
  • SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder
  • ExecutionAuxiliaryContract
